mlb_player_props.method: Consensus-qualified player props using season, history, L10, and matchup signals as supporting inputs

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season hits + runs + rbis per game 0.44 over 27 games
Posted 1.5 hits + runs + rbis line at +126 over
picks.pick: Ha-Seong Kim Under 1.5 Hits + Runs + RBIs
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 70.3%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 29.3%; Under history hit rate 287-506 (56.7%)

key_factors: WNBA3PM consensus gate required before BET/LEAN publication
